flags.message: Searched the six pipeline source extracts — the DoD 'Chinese military companies' listing is real-world context, not a corpus fact. Cite the Federal Register notice (90 FR 331, Jan. 6, 2025) or DoD's published 1260H list before publication.

The $4.04M 2025 figure is verbatim in the engine output, but the 'roughly five times its level from a year earlier' multiplier is not in this extract (it only covers 2025). Re-run xref.py client TENCENT over 2024 or soften to 'sharply higher.'
